name: file_ops
description: Operacoes seguras de leitura/listagem/criacao em modo auditavel
schema_zod: z.object({ path: z.string(), action: z.enum(['read','list','create']), dry_run: z.boolean().optional() })

name: http_ops
description: Operacoes HTTP simuladas com validacao de seguranca
schema_zod: z.object({ method: z.enum(['GET','POST']), url: z.string().url(), payload: z.record(z.any()).nullable().optional(), dry_run: z.boolean().optional() })

name: memory_ops
description: Operacoes de memoria contextual com namespace e chave
schema_zod: z.object({ action: z.enum(['set','get']), namespace: z.string(), key: z.string(), value: z.string().optional() })

name: db_ops
schema_zod: z.object({ query: z.string().min(1), mode: z.enum(['read','write']).default('read'), sandbox: z.boolean().optional(), dry_run: z.boolean().optional(), confirmed: z.boolean().optional() })

name: legal_rag_ops
description: Operacoes de ingestao e consulta juridica com validacao de citacao
schema_zod: z.object({ action: z.enum(['ingest','ask','sources']), path: z.string().optional(), query: z.string().optional(), dry_run: z.boolean().optional() })

name: ingest_ops
description: Ingestao local de arquivos markdown com deduplicacao e auditoria
schema_zod: z.object({ action: z.enum(['run','status']), path: z.string().optional(), dry_run: z.boolean().optional() })
